# geometry { #forensicface.geometry }

`geometry`

Geometry helpers used by image and video workflows.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [extend_bbox](#forensicface.geometry.extend_bbox) | Return bbox coordinates expanded by a margin and clipped to the frame. |
| [select_best_face](#forensicface.geometry.select_best_face) | Select one face by bbox size or centrality. |

### extend_bbox { #forensicface.geometry.extend_bbox }

```python
geometry.extend_bbox(bbox, frame_shape, margin_factor)
```

Return bbox coordinates expanded by a margin and clipped to the frame.

### select_best_face { #forensicface.geometry.select_best_face }

```python
geometry.select_best_face(img_shape, faces, criterion='size')
```

Select one face by bbox size or centrality.
